eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Florida; at 3:59 PM on MAY 31, 2019 Effective until 5:59 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A FLORIDA AMBER ALERT HAS BEEN ISSUED FOR BRUCE HAGANS A BLACK MALE 16 YEARS OLD 6 FEET 2 INCHES TALL 180 POUNDS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES LAST SEEN IN THE AREA OF 1000 BLOCK OF LINCOLN TERRANCE IN WINTER GARDEN FLORIDA WHO WAS LAST SEEN WEARING A GRAY SHIRT. BRUCE WAS ABDUCTED BY A LIGHT SKINNED BLACK MALE WITH DREADLOCKS DRIVING A DARK GRAY INFINITI G37. SUBJECTS OF THIS ALERT MAY BE ARMED AND DANGEROUS.  IF LOCATED DO NOT APPROACH. CONTACT LAW ENFORCEMENT IMMEDIATELY. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child please contact the Winter Garden Police Department at 407-877-5482 or 911. #FLAMBER.
